_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Manage application dependencies and package versions for data projects, including dependency specification, vulnerability scanning, upgrade planning, and cross-package compatibility verification.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-013 (SP, cosine: 0.430), DA-K-014 (DA, cosine: 0.429).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.622). Shared vocabulary: [dependencies, manage]. DCWF-only terms [risks] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, compatibility, cross, data, dependency, package] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.931, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.074 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Manage dependencies and risks." and "Manage application dependencies and package versions for data projects, includin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.630 ≈ STS 0.622 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [dependencies, manage] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [dependencies, manage]. DCWF-only: [risks]. WIDAI-only: [application, compatibility, cross, data, dependency, package].
